daily_summary: This sample demonstrates the JSON shape expected by the local tooling. Replace these placeholder items with researched events before treating an output as editorially complete.

candidates.title: Sample policy announcement
candidates.why_selected: Useful placeholder showing how a considered candidate is stored.

entries.title: Sample policy announcement
entries.summary_then: A placeholder event was announced on the lookback date.
entries.summary_now: One year later, this sample records where the follow-up state would go.
entries.direct_impacts: Replace with concrete direct impacts supported by sources.
entries.indirect_impacts: Replace with second-order effects or note that none are established.
entries.missed_by_original_coverage: Replace with what immediate coverage did not capture.
entries.one_year_assessment: Replace with a restrained conclusion that fits the evidence.
